info.title: Sharpitect.CLI
info.description:
Analyze .NET codebases and generate C4 architecture diagrams.
            Includes CLI commands for graph navigation and an MCP server for IDE integration.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Sharpitect - Analyze .NET codebases and build declaration graphs.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a .NET solution and build the declaration graph.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to a .sln file or directory containing one. Defaults to current directory.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new .sln.yml configuration file for a solution.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to a .sln file or directory containing one. Defaults to current directory.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Analyze a .NET solution and watch for file changes, logging all graph updates.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to a .sln file or directory containing one. Defaults to current directory.

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Start the MCP server for IDE integration. Builds the graph on startup.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to a .sln file or directory containing one. Defaults to current directory.

commands.name: install
commands.description: Configure Sharpitect as an MCP server for Claude Code.

commands.name: uninstall
commands.description: Remove Sharpitect MCP server configuration from Claude Code.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search for declarations by name.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search text to match against declaration names.

commands.name: node
commands.description: Get detailed information about a declaration node.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: children
commands.description: Get children (contained declarations) of a node.

arguments.name: parent-name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the parent declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class).

commands.name: ancestors
commands.description: Get containment hierarchy path from root to a node.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: relationships
commands.description: Get relationships (calls, inherits, references, etc.) for a node.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: callers
commands.description: Find methods/properties that call a specific method.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: callees
commands.description: Find methods/properties called by a specific method.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: inheritance
commands.description: Get inheritance hierarchy (base types and derived types).

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all declarations of a specific kind.

arguments.name: kind
arguments.description: Declaration kind to list (e.g., Class, Method, Property).

commands.name: dependencies
commands.description: Get project-level dependencies.

arguments.name: project-name
arguments.description: Name or fully qualified name of the project.

commands.name: dependents
commands.description: Get projects that depend on a given project.

arguments.name: project-name
arguments.description: Name or fully qualified name of the project.

commands.name: file
commands.description: Get all declarations in a specific source file.

arguments.name: file-path
arguments.description: Path to the source file.

commands.name: usages
commands.description: Find all usages of a type, method, or property.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: signature
commands.description: Get full signature and type information.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: code
commands.description: Display declaration summary and source code.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).

commands.name: tree
commands.description: Display the containment tree starting from a node or solution root.

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: Fully qualified name of the declaration (e.g., Namespace.Class.Method).Defaults to the solution root if no ID is provided.

commands.name: health
commands.description: Check the health of the database.
